text.title: QA Session-Based Test Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Session report says 'looked around, found stuff'.
antipattern.fix: Reject report; rewrite with a mission and rerun with intent.

antipattern.symptom: T=12% S=58% B=30%; session spent on environment problems.
antipattern.root-cause: Setup not pre-flighted; tester started cold.
antipattern.fix: Pre-flight env in the previous day; recover T-ratio in next session.

antipattern.symptom: Findings posted in chat; no committed report; nobody can audit later.
antipattern.fix: Add commit step to the session checklist; reject sessions without committed report.
